title: STATIONERY ISLAND 30x40cm Canvas for Painting 4 Packs, A3 Art Canvas Board 100% Cotton, Acid Free, Blank Canvas Panels for Acrylic Painting & Oil Paint, Hobby Painters and Beginner(12“ X 16”)
features: Perfect A3 Canvas for Painting - Elevate your painting experience with our 30 x 40cm canvas panels. Expertly crafted from 100% cotton, these A4 canvas provide a premium surface for your artwork.

100% Cotton A3 Canvas - Non-toxic and acid free with medium grain surface,Primed White,natural texture,high tinting strength ,it is stable and do not easy to shrink.The cotton canvas can keep the paints well and keep the painting with their natural tones and glossiness.

Artist Quality Canvas Panel - Lightweight panels are easy to store and carry. Convenient for outdoor sketching. Stretched canvas is a great choice for multiple painting uses and places such as artist studios, art classes, schools, and other painting activities.

Sturdy Construction - With a thickness of 0.3cm, our frames provide stability and durability for your paintings. The solid construction of these frames ensures your artwork remains secure and protected.

Versatile Application - Whether you're a professional artist or a hobbyist, our framed canvases are perfect for oil, acrylic, and mixed media paintings. Let your creativity flow on these high-quality surfaces.
description: Product Description Unleash Your Creativity Premium 100% Cotton Stretched Primed Canvas Board, perfect for Mixed Media.
